entry.title: Purpose
entry.content:
01

The purpose of this blog is to record some problems I have faced and make sure I will not struggle with them in the future.

02

This blog will record things below：

  • Some PTA algorithm problems on PTA solved by C/C++
  • Mini-games(just for fun)
  • Echarts files（mainly for architect）
  • PTE experience
  • Preparation works for study abroad (mainly for CS)
  • Python crawler
  • Some tutorials（like build this blog）

03

I will update this blog when I get some new ideas~
